channel.title: Shaders on Joe Muller's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Shaders on Joe Muller's Blog

item.title: Flutter Shaders vs Code Setup
item.description: This blog post will cover how to set up your VS Code environment for Flutter development with shaders. To start, install the glslc command line compiler from this link: https://github.com/google/shaderc?tab=readme-ov-file#downloads Save the glslangValidator executable to a location on your computer and note the path. Next, install the following two VS Code extensions: Shader languages support for VS Code Shaderc GLSL Linter ASI for GLSL In the GLSL Lint extension settings, set the path to the glslangValidator executable.
